title: okVanilla+
description: A personalized modpack, including optimization mods, with mods & resource packs that enhance the overall visuals of the game, while keeping the vanilla feel! Also comes with settings included so you can skip the most tedious part of modding!
body: A modpack full of optimizations, and textures/animations to provide the ultimate vanilla+ experience, perfect for singleplayer and servers alike! The modpack comes with the settings .txt files so you can simply add it and have everything already set up! (Including the deep and sometimes hard to figure out shader settings).
